title: Roasted Broccoli Bake
description: A simple and flavorful side dish made with roasted broccoli and a crispy top.
instructions: Toss broccoli with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
In a separate bowl, mix chicken broth and shredded cheddar cheese.
Transfer roasted broccoli to a baking dish and pour the cheese mixture over the top.
Bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and bubbly.
